name: SQL Monitor
description: Monitor a SQL database table for new or updated rows using a watermark column and trigger jobs when changes are detected

triggers.description: Triggers when rows newer than the watermark are found in the monitored table

outputs.description: Passes row information (table_name, watermark_column, watermark_value, row_id, row as JSON) to triggered jobs via run_config

connection_string_env_var.label: Connection String Env Var
connection_string_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable containing the SQLAlchemy connection string

table_name.label: Table Name
table_name.description: Name of the table to monitor. Use 'schema.table' for non-default schemas.

watermark_column.label: Watermark Column
watermark_column.description: Column used to detect new/updated rows (e.g., 'updated_at', 'created_at', 'id')

job_name.label: Job Name
job_name.description: Name of the job to trigger when new rows are detected

id_column.label: ID Column
id_column.description: Primary key column used as the run_key for deduplication. Defaults to the watermark_column if not set.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of rows to return per sensor evaluation

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Optional Dagster resource key providing a pre-configured client. When set, context.resources.<resource_key> is used instead of creating a connection from the other fields. See README for the expected interface.
